references.hebrew: לְבִנְיָמִ֣ן אָמַ֔ר יְדִ֣יד יְהֹוָ֔ה יִשְׁכֹּ֥ן לָבֶ֖טַח עָלָ֑יו חֹפֵ֤ף עָלָיו֙ כׇּל־הַיּ֔וֹם וּבֵ֥ין כְּתֵפָ֖יו שָׁכֵֽן׃ {ס}
references.english:
Of Benjamin he said:
Beloved of GOD,
He rests securely close by,
Ever protected,
As he rests between God’s shoulders.hAs he rests between God’s shoulders Or “He dwells amid God’s slopes.”

references.hebrew: כִּ֤י תָבֹ֙אוּ֙ אֶל־אֶ֣רֶץ כְּנַ֔עַן אֲשֶׁ֥ר אֲנִ֛י נֹתֵ֥ן לָכֶ֖ם לַאֲחֻזָּ֑ה וְנָתַתִּי֙ נֶ֣גַע צָרַ֔עַת בְּבֵ֖ית אֶ֥רֶץ אֲחֻזַּתְכֶֽם׃
references.english: When you enter the land of Canaan that I give you as a possession, and I inflict an eruptive plague upon a house in the land you possess,
